spec.long_desc: A massive figure of shaped stone stands in the undercroft, its blank face turning slowly toward you.
spec.detailed_desc: The golem is roughly man-shaped but scaled up by half, its body carved from a single piece of dense grey stone that shows marks of considerable craft — jointing at the limbs, a face with suggested rather than literal features, runes carved into the chest in a style consistent with the ruins above. It does not appear to breathe. It has been standing in this undercroft for a very long time, and it has been waiting the entire time.
